summary: Kimi Antonelli streaked to victory at Spa, capitalizing on a near-perfect drive to stretch his championship advantage over his struggling rivals. George Russell's crash handed Mercedes a bitter blow, leaving the Briton 50 points adrift and admitting to feeling numb to the mounting disappointments that have plagued the team's season. Antonelli now holds a commanding lead in the standings as Mercedes grapples with the reliability issues that threaten to squander what should be a dominant campaign.
